emails.subject: Hickerson "High Priority" brokerage agreements
emails.body: Hickerson "High Priority" brokerage agreements Cheryl: Have you responded to Aneela yet? Have drafts alreay been sent? I'd like to make sure that our internal process has been implemented so that we can address Gary's workload on a timely basis. If we need to meet, please let me know and I'll have Kaye schedule a meeting. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Hickerson "High Priority" brokerage agreements
emails.body: Re: Hickerson "High Priority" brokerage agreements Sara: I received the list from Aneela. The brokerage agreements marked on her list as priority were ones that I too had already marked as priority and hence, the same ones that Stephanie, Sam and I have been pushing, at the latest, since last week. One of the agreements, ITG, was sent for execution today we were awaiting Mark Haedicke's approval for an exeption and received it this morning. I conveyed all of this to Aneela earlier today. In most cases, the ball is in the court on the other side so I think from our end, I think from our end, we have been working diligently to get these agreements executed as soon as possible. At the moment, I do not think that we need to meet again. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3875 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 02/08/2001 01:56 PM
